title: A Story About Control and Care
article_text: I have a story about a product. The whole thing is almost ready, but we already have a concern. The rate of problems is low, so we do not expect a big effect. A small cause can still make us lose control. We stand here and continue our work. We care about every sort of detail. Do you ever see anything like this? We do not yet have a fall in quality. The age of the product is new. We speak with our team within the company.

sentences.en: I have a story about a product.
sentences.zh: 我有一个关于一个产品的故事。

words.eng_def: something made or grown to sell

sentences.en: The whole thing is almost ready, but we already have a concern.
sentences.zh: 整个事情几乎准备好了，但我们已经有一个担忧。

words.eng_def: before now or before a certain time
a feeling of worry about something important

sentences.en: The rate of problems is low, so we do not expect a big effect.
sentences.zh: 问题的比率很低，所以我们不期待大的影响。

words.eng_def: the speed, level, or amount of something
to think that something will happen
a change that happens because of something

sentences.en: A small cause can still make us lose control.
sentences.zh: 一个小小的原因仍然可能让我们失去控制。

words.eng_def: the power to make decisions or direct something

sentences.en: We stand here and continue our work.
sentences.zh: 我们站在这里并继续我们的工作。

words.eng_def: to keep doing something without stopping

sentences.en: We care about every sort of detail.

words.eng_def: to feel that something is important
a type or kind of something

sentences.en: Do you ever see anything like this?
sentences.zh: 你曾经见过像这样的任何东西吗？

sentences.en: We do not yet have a fall in quality.
sentences.zh: 我们还没有质量上的下降。

words.eng_def: a drop to a lower level

sentences.en: The age of the product is new.
sentences.zh: 这个产品的年龄是新的。

words.eng_def: the amount of time something has existed

sentences.en: We speak with our team within the company.
sentences.zh: 我们在公司内部与我们的团队交谈。

vocabulary.eng_def: the power to make decisions or direct something
vocabulary.example: We need to keep control of the process.

vocabulary.eng_def: before now or before a certain time
vocabulary.example: I already finished my work.

vocabulary.eng_def: a feeling of worry about something important
vocabulary.example: Her concern is for the children.

vocabulary.eng_def: something made or grown to sell
vocabulary.example: This product is new in the store.

vocabulary.eng_def: to no longer have something
vocabulary.example: Do not lose your keys.

vocabulary.eng_def: a telling of events
vocabulary.example: She tells a good story.

vocabulary.eng_def: not completely but very close
vocabulary.example: It is almost time to go.

vocabulary.eng_def: to keep doing something without stopping
vocabulary.example: Please continue your work.

vocabulary.eng_def: to be on your feet
vocabulary.example: We stand in line for tickets.

vocabulary.eng_def: all of something
vocabulary.example: The whole class is here.

vocabulary.eng_def: up to now; still
vocabulary.example: He is not here yet.

vocabulary.eng_def: the speed, level, or amount of something
vocabulary.example: The rate of growth is fast.

vocabulary.eng_def: to feel that something is important
vocabulary.example: I care about my family.

vocabulary.eng_def: to think that something will happen
vocabulary.example: I expect a call from you.

vocabulary.eng_def: a change that happens because of something
vocabulary.example: The medicine has a good effect.

vocabulary.eng_def: a type or kind of something
vocabulary.example: What sort of food do you like?

vocabulary.eng_def: at any time
vocabulary.example: Have you ever been there?

vocabulary.eng_def: any thing at all
vocabulary.example: I do not want anything.

vocabulary.eng_def: the reason something happens
vocabulary.example: What is the cause of the problem?

vocabulary.eng_def: a drop to a lower level
vocabulary.example: There is a fall in temperature.

quiz.question_cn: 下列哪个词的意思是“期待”？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'to think that something will happen'?
Which word means 'not completely but very close'?
Which word means 'the reason something happens'?
Which word means 'any thing at all'?
Which word means 'to keep doing something without stopping'?

image_prompts: A person holding a product and smiling, with a thought bubble showing a story symbol.
A large object almost complete, with a clock showing 'already' and a worried face icon.
A graph with low rate of problems, and a person looking calmly at a small effect icon.
A small matchstick causing a big fire, with a person losing control of a steering wheel.
A person standing firmly and continuing to paint a wall.
A magnifying glass over different sorts of details, with a heart icon for care.
A person looking at a box with a question mark, asking 'ever seen anything like this?'
A quality chart with no fall, and a calendar showing 'yet'.
A baby product with a label 'new age'.
A team sitting in a circle speaking, with a company building icon in the background.
